text:
Maybe there was once this man...Arthur just loves stories. So much. He'd find anything charming. Maybe harvest moon weekends hanging lanterns. Yeah!

It's Arthur's life!

One day he finds a little old book shop. That's good. There Arthur finds a tale.

Harry. Sounds silly? He loves Harry Potter.

That book...has him. A girl that talks to birds?

He reads. She saves the wizard. How cute? But Arthur likes cats.

That one he hates.

So yeah. Harry. That's him.

After school he writes letters. A owl goes...

A owl...does he?

Oh yes! A real owl.

That was love. That was forever?

Arthur sends letters.

One day it goes missing.

He phones.

You're lost. You flew into something metal.

Something like an axe.

He smiles...

Weird owl.

Then.

He saw.

That.


A owl.

In London. Just hopping about.

His heart.


Did he think.
